name: Avalonia UI
description: Cross-platform .NET UI framework for building desktop, mobile, web, and embedded apps using XAML and C#.

seo.title: Avalonia UI — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Avalonia UI: Cross-platform .NET UI framework for building desktop, mobile, web, and embedded apps using XAML and C#.

when_to_use: Cross-platform desktop app from a single C# + XAML codebase
Porting a WPF app to macOS and Linux without rewrite
Internal tooling dashboard running on Windows, Mac, and Linux
Embedded UI for industrial control systems with .NET
Mobile + desktop app sharing UI components via XAML

pros: XAML syntax familiar to WPF devs
Active OSS community and commercial backing
cons: Smaller ecosystem than WPF or MAUI
review.verdict: The best cross-platform XAML framework for .NET devs who outgrew MAUI or WPF limitations.
review.best_for: .NET teams migrating WPF apps to Linux, macOS, or mobile platforms
review.not_for: Teams committed to platform-native SDKs like SwiftUI or Jetpack Compose
